roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PITCHESS IN CAMERA CONDUCTED BY JUDGE MOSCONE, REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA
DEFT'S MOT TO ADD TO CAL (FOR DISPO) FILED
DA'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOT TO SUPPRESS FILED
DEFT'S MTS EVID PER PC1538,5 FILED
DEFT'S MOT TO CONTINUE PRELIM HRG FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE AT THE TIME OF PRELIMINARY HEARING ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY,/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 85D/CTS:85/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH INDIVIDUAL TREATMENT AND REHABILITATION  PLAN AS DIRECTED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/WS/CTORD:WEAPON SEIZED IN THIS MATTER TO BE DESTROYED OR RETURNEDTO THE LAWFUL OWNER/ /X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE COLLECTIONS UNIT IN ROOM 101,  HALL OF JUSTICE, WITHIN 72 HOURS OF RELEASE FROM CUSTODY TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS TO PAY THE FINE AND OTHER MONETARY OBLIGATIONS, FAILURE TO DO  SO MAY SUBJECT THE DEFENDANT TO A $300 CIVIL ASSESSMENT,/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:005/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/PRES:11-30-12/VD:11-15-12 BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PSR & SENTENCE/DOP/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC 1538,5 MOT/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF:SERGEANT OLIVER/WIT SWORN:JAMES FUNK; BRIAN OLIVER/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1- PHOTO OF A HANDGUN; 2-BLACK & WHITE PHOTO OF A HANDGUN AND MAGAZINE; DEFENSE A-GROUP OF PHOTOS MARKED A1-A11 OF LOWER LEVEL OF PAYLESS SHOE STORE INCIDENT AREA; DEFENSE B- GROUP OF PHOTOS MARKED B1-B5 OF PARC 55 HOTEL INCIDENT AREA /EXHM:PEOPLE'S 3-DOJ BUREAU OF FIREARM HISTORY REPORT (2 PAGES)/ /DEFT WV CPX/DOP//CONTD:ARGUMENT & RULING ON PRELIM & PC 1538,5 MOT/

/CAL: 1043 EC (PITCHESS) MOTION/DAWT/X: RONNIE WAGNER, WITH THE S,F,P,D,LEGAL DEPT,, IS PRESENT IN COURT,/X: PITCHESS STIPULATION IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,  PARTIES AGREE TO A COMPLIANCE DATE OF 11-15-12 FOR POLICE LEGAL TO DELIVER RELEVANT MATERIAL TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND A DUE DATE OF 11-29-12 FOR MATERIALS, IF ANY, TO BE PROVIDED TO THE DEFENSE,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDSRELEASED TO PUBLIC DEFENDER,/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 11-13-12/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 09-25-12/987,2/BAIL:200000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:APD NOTICE OF RESTITUTION/DAWT/X:APD DETERMINED RESTITUTION AT ZERO,COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION IF THERE IS ANY RESTITUTION IN THE FUTURE,/
